title: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
